scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Require: 100rel RSeq: 1 Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress Via:[$1] [last_From:] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE Require: 100rel RSeq: 2 Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via:[$1] [last_From:] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 a=ptime:10

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$3] To: [$2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 BYE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
